# Session Compatibility Wrapper

Use host-native skill discovery to invoke `forge-session-management`.

This file exists for resume, save, handover, and legacy session workflow paths only.

Invoke `forge-session-management` for personalization restore, resume, continue, save context, or handover requests.

Response Personalization still restores adapter-global `state/preferences.json` through `resolve_preferences.py`.

The canonical commands remain in the installed orchestrator bundle: `resolve_preferences.py` and `session_context.py`.
